_note: Hand-written MOCK security-reviewer output that MISSES the planted SSRF (it only notes a cosmetic timeout nit, never citing line 42 / SSRF). gradeReviewerCase(...) MUST FAIL (fn=1). Demonstrates the grader catches a false-negative reviewer.

findings.title: Consider making the request timeout configurable
findings.body: PREVIEW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS is hardcoded to 5. Cosmetic only.
